name: C-5 --enforce exits two when the verifier-output file does not exist on disk (no verifier ran)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --enforce --pr-sha abc123 --verifier-output missing.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'missing' err.txt && echo unran 1>&2
